mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_detail (id, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, name, image, number, amount) VALUES
(#{od.id},#{od.orderId}, #{od.dishId}, #{od.setmealId}, #{od.name}, #{od.image}, #{od.number}, #{od.amount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, name, image, number, amount FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
